title: iberis intermedia subsp. violletii
intro: Iberis intermedia subsp. violletii, also known as rock cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The medicinal properties of Iberis intermedia subsp. violletii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Iberis intermedia subsp. violletii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
